articles.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce married in ceremony officiated by Adam Sandler - CBS News
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were married as they celebrated their wedding with hundreds of guests Friday at Madison Square Garden in New York City.

articles.title: Donald Trump Tries to Troll Taylor Swift on Her Wedding Night, But She Parties on - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: The specter of a wedding on a holiday he seeks to own seemed to irk the president, or at least the staff manning the White House Instagram feed.

articles.title: Brad Paisley, Kimberly Williams-Paisley Thank Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce for 'Amazing Donation' - Rolling Stone
articles.description: Brad Paisley and Kimberly Williams-Paisley thanked Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce for their "amazing donation" ahead of the couple's wedding.
